message:
style(tui): drop redundant String allocation for static empty-tree placeholder

The tree_list_render_text branch for "no dependency tree" was passing
`"(no dependency tree — all issues are independent)".to_string()` into
`RichText::raw`. RichText::raw takes `Into<String>` via AsRef-style
conversion, so the explicit `.to_string()` on a string literal was
allocating a fresh `String` on every render pass (this function is called
inside the TUI render loop, not once-per-session). Removed the call so
the literal is converted once at the call site without the intermediate.

Purely an allocation cleanup on a hot path; no visible behavior change.
